## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do? What's slow, missing, or awkward today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Concrete UX / API / behavior change. If you have a sketch or mockup, attach it. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Why is the proposed solution better than the alternatives? -->

## Scope

- [ ] This can be built without changes to `awg-helper`
- [ ] This requires a new helper verb (bump helper version + sudoers entry)
- [ ] This requires a change to `amneziawg-go` or `amneziawg-tools`
